# Request

*Analytics*. The record of an attempt to send an email through Twilio SendGrid.

Whenever your app or server uses Twilio SendGrid to send an email message to one of your customers, Twilio records a request in your dashboard. If the send succeeds, Twilio records it as a delivery. If the send fails, Twilio records the error.

To learn more about Twilio SendGrid data, see [Statistics](/docs/sendgrid/ui/analytics-and-reporting/stats-overview/).
